name: Leonard's Malasada Mobile
tagline: Can't make it to Kapahulu? The Malasada Mobile brings the magic to you — same recipe, same dangerous habit-forming quality.
parking: Varies by location — usually parks near shopping centers or event venues with adjacent parking
talkStory: An extension of the Leonard's Bakery legacy (est. 1952), the Malasada Mobile is a food truck that brings the same Portuguese doughnuts to events, festivals, and neighborhoods across Oahu. Same family recipes as the Kapahulu mothership — rolled in sugar, fried to order, impossibly light inside. The truck's schedule rotates, so check their Instagram @leonardsbakery for locations. Pro tip: they're best eaten within five minutes of frying while the outside is still crackling. Cash only at the truck.
